metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace backing Microsoft Sentinel.

properties.displayName: TCLBANKER - DLL Side-Loading via Spoofed Logitech Plugin
properties.description: Detects loading of screen_retriever_plugin.dll (abused by TCLBANKER, signed with a forged 'Logitech Inc' identity) from an unexpected path or with an untrusted signature - indicative of DLL side-loading. Sub-techniques: T1574.002, T1036.001. Source: CYBERXTRON 2026-05-06.
properties.query:
DeviceImageLoadEvents
| where FileName =~ "screen_retriever_plugin.dll"
| where not(FolderPath startswith "C:\\Program Files\\" or FolderPath startswith "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\")
| join kind=leftouter (DeviceFileCertificateInfo | project SHA256, IsSigned, IsTrusted, Signer) on SHA256
| where IsTrusted != true or isempty(IsTrusted)
| extend Algorithm = "SHA256", AdvisoryName = "TCLBANKER Banking Trojan", ThreatActor = "TCLBANKER operators"
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, FolderPath, FileName, SHA256, Algorithm, Signer, IsTrusted, AdvisoryName, ThreatActor, ReportId

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Detects loading of screen_retriever_plugin.dll (abused by TCLBANKER, signed with a forged 'Logitech Inc' identity) from an unexpected path or with an untrusted signature - indicative of DLL side-loading. Sub-techniques: T1574.002, T1036.001. Source: CYBERXTRON 2026-05-06.
